director.name: 卡迈勒·阿尔贾法里 Kamal Aljafari

introduction: A helicopter sweeps the desert, surveying a land at once ancient and modern, natural and built. Farmers work their fields, children play and bells sound a call to prayer. Dynamite ruptures the earth. UNDR is a poignant found-footage essay film about an otherworldly landscape charged with history and potential that has become an eerie site of surveillance and incursion.源自：https://bfmaf.org/programme/undr-what-fog-shokouk-a-cosmicomedy-in-four-acts-qa/
